questions.question: Design a 4-bit full adder and its truth table, and explain how it can be simulated using basic gates. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explaining the concept of basic gates (AND, OR, NOT) and their application in the design of a full adder

questions.question: Design a 4-bit full subtractor and its truth table, and explain how it can be simulated using basic gates. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explaining the concept of basic gates (AND, OR, NOT) and their application in the design of a full subtractor

questions.question: Compare and explain the differences between the design and implementation of a 4-bit full adder and a 4-bit full subtractor using basic gates. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explaining the differences in the design and implementation of full adder and full subtractor
